creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Hey Zach,

Thanks for looking into this. So it was fixed upstream. That's excellent news.

Don't worry too much about submitting the patch blindly, I did this so many times when I first joined the community and it bit me every time, no matter how small the change. This is why port maintainers and committers are in place, to do quality assurance and ensure a change is actually required.

Thanks for doing the QA required here!


Going to close the ticket as this is no longer a problem and fixed upstream.
